changeSet.author: hrms
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE payslips ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, tenant_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, payroll_run_id UUID NOT NULL, employee_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, salary_structure_id UUID NOT NULL, payslip_number VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, payroll_month INTEGER NOT NULL, payroll_year INTEGER NOT NULL, working_days INTEGER NOT NULL, present_days DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL, leave_days DECIMAL(5,2), absent_days DECIMAL(5,2), basic_salary DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, hra DECIMAL(15,2), transport_allowance DECIMAL(15,2), medical_allowance DECIMAL(15,2), special_allowance DECIMAL(15,2), other_allowances DECIMAL(15,2), overtime_amount DECIMAL(15,2), bonus_amount DECIMAL(15,2), gross_salary DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, provident_fund DECIMAL(15,2), professional_tax DECIMAL(15,2), income_tax DECIMAL(15,2), other_deductions DECIMAL(15,2), loan_deduction DECIMAL(15,2), total_deductions DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, net_salary DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL, payment_mode VARCHAR(50), payment_date DATE, payment_reference VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, remarks TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, version BIGINT DEFAULT 0, FOREIGN KEY (payroll_run_id) REFERENCES payroll_runs(id), FOREIGN KEY (salary_structure_id) REFERENCES salary_structures(id) );
CREATE INDEX idx_payslips_tenant ON payslips(tenant_id); CREATE INDEX idx_payslips_employee ON payslips(employee_id); CREATE INDEX idx_payslips_payroll_run ON payslips(payroll_run_id); CREATE INDEX idx_payslips_period ON payslips(payroll_year, payroll_month); CREATE INDEX idx_payslips_status ON payslips(status); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_payslips_number ON payslips(tenant_id, payslip_number);
